---
title: "deseq2_analysis"
output: html_notebook
---

---
title: "DESeq2_all"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-17"
---

```{r}
library(DESeq2)
library(tidyverse)
library(apeglm)
library(biomaRt)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
```

## 1. Import and clean counts

```{r}
counts_all <- read.csv("all_samples_counts_matrix.csv", row.names = 1)

# Standardise sample name formatting
colnames(counts_all) <- gsub("^X", "", colnames(counts_all))
colnames(counts_all) <- gsub("\\.", "-", colnames(counts_all))
colnames(counts_all) <- gsub("2O", "20", colnames(counts_all))

# Set missing values to zero and round to integers (required by DESeq2)
counts_all[is.na(counts_all)] <- 0
counts_all <- round(counts_all)
counts_all <- as.matrix(counts_all)
storage.mode(counts_all) <- "integer"
```

## 2. Build sample metadata

```{r}
sample_names <- colnames(counts_all)

coldata_all <- data.frame(
  row.names = sample_names,
  age = ifelse(grepl("young", sample_names), "young", "old")
)
coldata_all$age <- factor(coldata_all$age, levels = c("young", "old"))

# Confirm sample order matches between counts and metadata
stopifnot(all(colnames(counts_all) == rownames(coldata_all)))
```

## 3. Filter low-count genes

```{r}
# Remove genes with fewer than 20 total counts across all samples
keep_total <- rowSums(counts_all) >= 20
counts_all <- counts_all[keep_total, ]

# Additional filter: retain genes with >10 counts in at least 3 samples per age group
young_samples <- rownames(coldata_all)[coldata_all$age == "young"]
old_samples   <- rownames(coldata_all)[coldata_all$age == "old"]

keep_robust <- (rowSums(counts_all[, young_samples] > 10) >= 3) |
               (rowSums(counts_all[, old_samples]   > 10) >= 3)
counts_all <- counts_all[keep_robust, ]

dim(counts_all)
```

## 4. Build DESeq2 dataset

```{r}
dds_all <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts_all,
  colData   = coldata_all,
  design    = ~ age
)

dds_all <- DESeq(dds_all)

res_all <- results(dds_all, contrast = c("age", "old", "young"))
res_all <- lfcShrink(dds_all, coef = "age_old_vs_young", type = "apeglm")

res_df_all <- as.data.frame(res_all)
res_df_all <- res_df_all[order(res_df_all$padj), ]

saveRDS(dds_all, "dds_all.rds")
```

## 5. Annotate gene symbols (BioMart)

```{r}
mart <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "mmusculus_gene_ensembl")

annotate_symbols <- function(res_df, mart) {
  ids <- gsub("\\..*", "", rownames(res_df))

  symbol_map <- getBM(
    attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "mgi_symbol"),
    filters    = "ensembl_gene_id",
    values     = ids,
    mart       = mart
  )

  res_df$ensembl_id <- ids
  res_df <- merge(res_df, symbol_map, by.x = "ensembl_id", by.y = "ensembl_gene_id", all.x = TRUE)

  # Fall back to Ensembl ID where no symbol is available
  res_df$mgi_symbol[is.na(res_df$mgi_symbol) | res_df$mgi_symbol == ""] <- res_df$ensembl_id[is.na(res_df$mgi_symbol) | res_df$mgi_symbol == ""]

  res_df <- res_df[order(res_df$padj), ]
  res_df
}

res_df_all <- annotate_symbols(res_df_all, mart)
```

## 6. Classify and export significant genes

```{r}
sig_genes_all <- subset(res_df_all, padj < 0.05)
sig_up_old_all   <- subset(sig_genes_all, log2FoldChange > 0)   # upregulated in old
sig_down_old_all <- subset(sig_genes_all, log2FoldChange < 0)   # upregulated in young

write.csv(res_df_all, "DESeq2_results_all.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(sig_genes_all, "DESeq2_sig_genes_all.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(sig_up_old_all, "DESeq2_upregulated_in_old_all.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(sig_down_old_all, "DESeq2_upregulated_in_young_all.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

## 7. Map gene symbols via org.Mm.eg.db (secondary annotation)

```{r}
deseq_mapped <- res_df_all %>%
  mutate(gene_symbol = mapIds(org.Mm.eg.db,
                               keys      = ensembl_id,
                               column    = "SYMBOL",
                               keytype   = "ENSEMBL",
                               multiVals = "first")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_symbol) & gene_symbol != "")

write_csv(deseq_mapped, "deseq_results_with_symbols.csv")
message("✔ Wrote deseq_results_with_symbols.csv (", nrow(deseq_mapped), " rows)")
```

---

## Optional: Protein-coding-only parallel analysis

```{r}
mart_pc <- useMart("ensembl", dataset = "mmusculus_gene_ensembl")

gene_ids <- gsub("\\..*", "", rownames(counts_all))

biotype_map <- getBM(
  attributes = c("ensembl_gene_id", "gene_biotype"),
  filters    = "ensembl_gene_id",
  values     = gene_ids,
  mart       = mart_pc
)

protein_coding_ids <- biotype_map$ensembl_gene_id[biotype_map$gene_biotype == "protein_coding"]
```

```{r}
counts_pc <- counts_all[gsub("\\..*", "", rownames(counts_all)) %in% protein_coding_ids, ]

dds_pc <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
  countData = counts_pc,
  colData   = coldata_all,
  design    = ~ age
)

dds_pc <- DESeq(dds_pc)

res_pc <- results(dds_pc, contrast = c("age", "old", "young"))
res_pc <- lfcShrink(dds_pc, coef = "age_old_vs_young", type = "apeglm")

res_df_pc <- as.data.frame(res_pc)
res_df_pc <- res_df_pc[order(res_df_pc$padj), ]
res_df_pc <- annotate_symbols(res_df_pc, mart_pc)

saveRDS(dds_pc, "dds_protein_coding.rds")
```

```{r}
sig_genes_pc <- subset(res_df_pc, padj < 0.05)
sig_up_old_pc   <- subset(sig_genes_pc, log2FoldChange > 0)
sig_down_old_pc <- subset(sig_genes_pc, log2FoldChange < 0)

write.csv(res_df_pc, "DESeq2_results_protein_coding.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(sig_genes_pc, "DESeq2_sig_genes_protein_coding.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(sig_up_old_pc, "DESeq2_upregulated_in_old_protein_coding.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(sig_down_old_pc, "DESeq2_upregulated_in_young_protein_coding.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
